name: claudecompress
description: Analyze and shrink Claude Code session transcripts so /resume loads faster and cheaper.

scripts.build: bun build src/index.ts src/ccw.ts --target=node --outdir=dist && node scripts/sync-version.js
scripts.prepublishOnly: bun test tests/ && bun build src/index.ts src/ccw.ts --target=node --outdir=dist && node scripts/sync-version.js

author: bihanikeshav
